item.title: NEW BRAINROTS I MADE! I love how these truned out and @soydrop for the idea of colors and makeing look deeper into prana plants to see there colors just to copy there idea at the end because mud vanupino didnt work out #stealabrainrot #fanmade #ideas #sab
item.description: By @mr.stealer_karker: NEW BRAINROTS I MADE! I love how these truned out and @soydrop for the idea of colors and makeing look deeper into prana plants to see there colors just to copy there idea at the end because mud vanupino didnt work out #stealabrainrot #fanmade #ideas #sab

item.title: Triple T is building a new home inside of Tralalero Tralala. Tralalero doesn't like that, so he gets help from Ballerina Cappuccina to remove Tung Tung Tung Sahur from his head. Italian Brainrot Cartoons generated with Seedance 2.0 #italianbrainrot #aislo
item.description: By @fabianmosele: Triple T is building a new home inside of Tralalero Tralala. Tralalero doesn't like that, so he gets help from Ballerina Cappuccina to remove Tung Tung Tung Sahur from his head. Italian Brainrot Cartoons generated with Seedance 2.0 #italianbrainrot #aislo
